type: CLAIM

summary: Extracting normalize_image_bytes helper for image base64 normalization in types.py

type: CLAIM
files: llama-index-core/llama_index/core/base/llms/types.py
summary: Adding get_image_mimetype() method to ImageBlock for lazy MIME type resolution/caching

type: INTENT
files: llama-index-core/llama_index/core/base/llms/types.py (ImageBlock class, adding new method get_image_mimetype + minor tweak to image_to_base64 validator to call it)
summary: Will add get_image_mimetype() method for lazy/cached mimetype resolution; only touching ImageBlock class body, should not conflict with your normalize_image_bytes helper if you keep that in image_to_base64/resolve_image scope

type: STATUS
files: llama-index-core/llama_index/core/base/llms/types.py
summary: Added module-level normalize_image_bytes(image) -> (encoded_image, decoded_for_guessing) helper above TextBlock; image_to_base64 validator now does: self.image, decoded_for_guessing = normalize_image_bytes(self.image); then filetype.guess(decoded_for_guessing). No new methods added to ImageBlock class body itself, so your get_image_mimetype() addition should merge cleanly as long as it calls normalize_image_bytes/reads self.image_mimetype rather than re-deriving mimetype guessing logic inline.

type: STATUS
files: llama-index-core/llama_index/core/base/llms/types.py
summary: Done: added get_image_mimetype() method on ImageBlock (checks cached image_mimetype, else filetype.guess, caches result); image_to_base64 validator now calls it instead of inline guess logic. Tests pass. Not using normalize_image_bytes since my copy doesn't show it yet, but change is additive/isolated to ImageBlock method body so should merge fine.
